headline: Removed the intrusive first-run popup and cleaned the mobile city-field section for a calmer editorial flow.
focus: Remove the onboarding popup sheet and bundle the pending home/mobile readability fixes into one calmer release.
notes: Removed the planner/magazine first-run popup sheet so entry pages feel calmer and more editorial.
Rewrote the Korean city-field copy to feel like public travel editorial copy instead of internal taxonomy language.
Tightened the mobile East Asia field section and increased dock-safe padding to reduce footer overlap on iPhone.
